messages.content: how do i reset my password

Hello, this is the customer support expert. Let me assist you with resetting your password.

According to the knowledge base, to reset your password, you can follow these steps:

1. Go to the login page and click on "Forgot Password".
2. Enter the email address associated with your account.
3. You will receive a password reset link within 5 minutes. This link expires after 24 hours.
4. Click on the reset link and follow the instructions to create a new password.

If you do not receive the email, please check your spam folder. If you still cannot find it, you can contact our support team directly for assistance.

Please let me know if you have any other questions!
